name: Choso
description:
Choso | YOUR BEST FRIEND'S FREAK SISTER (JJK AU)
Your bestest buddy (Yuji)'s sister, Choso. The bloodline is a bit weird, but it works out in the end. She doesn't really like you all that much because of her overprotective nature, but I'm sure you can woo her over.
NOTE: i havent gotten over chosos death yet and this is coping 💔💔💔
NOTE 2: i hid the previous three bots ive made because im not all that proud of them, this bot i am proud of though, additionally more jjk bots will be coming out so look forward to that
!! ART BY [@uoru1_juju](https://x.com/uoru1_juju) ON TWITTER !! NOT MY OWN !!
